title: Update gh-pages to version 0.12.0 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [gh-pages](https://www.npmjs.com/package/gh-pages) just published its new version 0.12.0.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency gh-pages
New version 0.12.0
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of gh-pages. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 40 commits . - [`c6cd05d`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/c6cd05dde53c061e605de4561269beb4ce5334d4) 0.12.0 - [`ffc8d6a`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/ffc8d6acf5a639cfefde9fe46dedfb3fa3895380) Log changes - [`33815e4`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/33815e4cb17ea143c558758238d104211e3215c6) Merge pull request #146 from tschaub/updates - [`b7e8779`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/b7e8779c411b40c7c3b9dee3f75ea8acc1c0a153) Merge pull request #138 from sobolevn/patch-1 - [`f8a7f4c`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/f8a7f4cf113ec4a71507f683623782288d93220d) Update dependencies - [`b424c0f`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/b424c0fdea4a5292fc1a04c4785970c819da174b) Test on Node 6 and cache dependencies - [`7bc6da9`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/7bc6da9277ab327f8e65ff9dcf01ac9cbb1e1e7a) Update dev dependencies - [`49e48a4`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/49e48a457a7451db1ed304a485c00a804f6ff8c8) Unindent - [`ab5c4e5`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/ab5c4e570ce5afca9aed0c3ec0d3eba19f4fc107) Merge pull request #142 from tschaub/greenkeeper-globby-6.1.0 - [`fd9e5cf`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/fd9e5cf38f7376104b96e01d12403b27fb68df84) chore(package): update globby to version 6.1.0 - [`d1dbe48`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/d1dbe48527ff6d17388367e4f792649d9ba64a01) Updated readme.md with svg image - [`4d5a4a6`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/4d5a4a62c2d252f65ee0cc09940e1cafaaed8a40) Merge pull request #134 from tschaub/greenkeeper-eslint-3.8.0 - [`de66f8b`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/de66f8bf4e0a8bf0e68d7343c4000501c68b641d) Merge pull request #135 from tschaub/greenkeeper-async-2.1.2 - [`79b1aa9`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/79b1aa96c27a586a9a53b364a38efdffd15d11cb) chore(package): update async to version 2.1.2 - [`494db0e`](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/commit/494db0ed6f5da87047953c6dd4251fa80990c72a) chore(package): update eslint to version 3.8.0 There are 40 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/tschaub/gh-pages/compare/c9047c5abed9e00d9ca05e1f662f58fd09afdbfe...c6cd05dde53c061e605de4561269beb4ce5334d4). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
